name: Daily Job Hunter — Search, Track & Recruiter Monitor

nodes.name: Daily 8AM Trigger
nodes.notes: Runs once every day at 8:00 AM. Change cron expression to adjust timing.

assignments.name: RESUME_TEXT
assignments.value: PASTE YOUR FULL RESUME TEXT HERE — Name, skills, experience, education, achievements. The AI uses this to score job matches and generate cover letters.

nodes.name: ⚙️ CONFIG — Edit Your Details Here
nodes.notes: EDIT THIS NODE: Set your job title, location, email, name, resume text, and Google Sheet ID. This is your main configuration panel.

nodes.name: 🔍 JSearch API — Fetch Jobs
nodes.notes: JSearch free tier: 200 requests/month on RapidAPI. Searches LinkedIn, Indeed, Glassdoor, ZipRecruiter simultaneously. Replace YOUR_RAPIDAPI_KEY_HERE with your key from rapidapi.com/letscrape-6bRBa3QguO5/api/jsearch

messages.content: You are an expert career coach and ATS resume scorer. Respond ONLY with valid JSON, no markdown, no explanation. Return exactly this structure: {"score": <0-100 integer>, "reason": "<one sentence>", "missing_skills": ["skill1","skill2"], "apply": <true|false>}

nodes.name: 🤖 AI Match Score (Groq Free)
nodes.notes: Uses Groq free tier (llama-3.3-70b). Get key at console.groq.com. Scores each job 0-100 against your resume. Only applies if score >= 65.

messages.content: You are an expert cover letter writer. Write a concise, professional cover letter (200-250 words max). Address it 'Dear Hiring Team' unless company is known. No placeholder text. No brackets. Start directly. End with contact info on separate lines.

parameters.subject: =🚀 Application Ready: {{ $json.job_title }} @ {{ $json.company }} (Score: {{ $json.ai_score }}/100)
parameters.message:
=

🎯 Job Application Ready

{{ $json.apply_date }}

{{ $json.ai_missing ? '' : '' }}
Position{{ $json.job_title }}
Company{{ $json.company }}
Location{{ $json.location }}
AI Score{{ $json.ai_score }}/100
Why Match{{ $json.ai_reason }}
Skill Gaps' + $json.ai_missing + '
Apply Here👉 Click to Apply

📝 Generated Cover Letter

{{ $json.cover_letter }}

This application was auto-identified by your n8n Job Hunter. Review the cover letter, apply via the link above, and reply to this email to add notes.

nodes.name: Get All Applied Jobs
nodes.notes: Runs in parallel with job search. Fetches all jobs marked 'Applied' to check for recruiter replies.

filters.q: =is:unread from:recruiter OR from:hiring OR subject:interview OR subject:application OR subject:opportunity OR subject:position newer_than:7d

nodes.name: 📬 Read Gmail (Recruiter Emails)
nodes.notes: Reads unread emails matching recruiter/interview/application keywords from last 7 days.

messages.content: You are a career advisor. Analyze recruiter emails and provide actionable summaries. Be direct and helpful. Format using HTML with <h3>, <ul>, <li>, <strong>, <span style='color:#...'>. Use green for positive signals, orange for neutral, red for rejections.

=Analyze these recruiter emails and summarize:

APPLIED JOBS COUNT: {{ $json.applied_count }}

RECRUITER EMAILS ({{ $json.replies.length }} found):
{{ $json.replies.map((r,i) => `
[${i+1}] FROM: ${r.from}\nSUBJECT: ${r.subject}\nDATE: ${r.date}\nMATCHED JOB: ${r.matched_job}\nSNIPPET: ${r.body_snippet.substring(0,400)}`).join('\n---\n') }}

Provide:
1. Overall job search status summary
2. For each email: type (interview invite/rejection/follow-up/spam), urgency, recommended action
3. Priority actions to take TODAY
4. Encouragement and next steps

parameters.subject: =📊 Daily Job Hunt Report — {{ $json.today }} | {{ $json.reply_count }} Recruiter Email(s)
parameters.message:
=

📊 Daily Job Hunt Report

{{ $json.today }}

{{ $json.applied_count }}
Total Applied
{{ $json.reply_count }}
Recruiter Emails

🤖 AI Analysis & Action Items

{{ $json.ai_summary }}
{{ $json.raw_replies.length > 0 ? '

📬 Recruiter Emails Detected (' + $json.raw_replies.length + ')

' + $json.raw_replies.map((r,i) => '
' + r.from + '
' + r.subject + '
' + r.date + ' | Matched: ' + r.matched_job + '
').join('') + '
' : '
📭 No recruiter emails today — keep applying!
' }}

View full application tracker: Open Google Sheet

nodes.name: ⭐ Star Recruiter Emails
nodes.notes: Stars recruiter reply emails in Gmail for easy visibility.

parameters.subject: =⚠️ Job Hunter Error — {{ $now.format('yyyy-MM-dd') }}
parameters.message:
=The daily job hunt workflow encountered an issue:

Workflow: Daily Job Hunter
Time: {{ $now }}
Error: No job results returned from JSearch API.

Possible causes:
- JSearch API key is invalid or quota exceeded
- Network timeout
- Search terms too restrictive

Please check your n8n execution log for details.
Direct link: http://localhost:5678/executions
